meta.title: EduChain — Educational Blockchain Platform by GEMBA IT
meta.description: Safe, educational Web3 platform for young learners. Mint NFTs, earn GAME tokens, and trade on a curated marketplace — all on Ethereum Sepolia testnet. Built by GEMBA IT.

home.title: Home
home.description: Enter the EduChain learning universe. Mint NFTs, earn GAME tokens, and rise on the leaderboard. Safe Web3 education for everyone.

gallery.title: My Collection
gallery.description: View your EduChain NFT collection. Predefined and custom NFTs you have minted or bought on the marketplace.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.description: Buy and sell NFTs and GAME tokens on the EduChain marketplace. Peer-to-peer trading with rate limits for safe learning.

shop.title: Token Shop
shop.description: Buy GAME tokens with ETH. Mint predefined NFTs directly or batch-mint custom NFTs with your GAME tokens.

faucet.title: ETH Faucet
faucet.description: Claim free 0.05 ETH every 24 hours. Sepolia testnet faucet for whitelisted EduChain learners.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Top EduChain players ranked by on-chain holdings. Points computed live from Sepolia: 1pt per token, 10pt per Predefined NFT, 30pt per Custom NFT.

rankings.title: Full Rankings
rankings.description: Complete EduChain rankings with search, filter, and sort by points, tokens, or NFT type.

about.title: About
about.description: About EduChain — our mission to teach Web3 to young learners through hands-on, safe blockchain interactions. Built by GEMBA IT.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact EduChain — request a course, partner with us, or join as a learner. We respond within 48 hours.

errors.notWhitelisted: Your wallet is not whitelisted yet.

home.title: EduChain
home.subtitle: An on-chain NFT and token platform for educational use cases on Sepolia.

description.p1: EduChain is an educational Web3 platform on the Sepolia testnet that turns smart contracts into a game. Connect MetaMask, claim free testnet ETH from the faucet, buy GAME tokens, and mint your own NFTs. Earn points from every transaction and compete with other students on the on-chain leaderboard.
description.p2: The project is built on 7 audited Solidity contracts — whitelist access, ERC20 tokens, two ERC721 NFT collections, a multi-token marketplace, and a tracking/leaderboard contract. Everything is transparent, verifiable, and free to experiment with.

shop.title: Token shop
shop.body: Buy GAME tokens and mint NFTs directly from the contract.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.body: List, buy and trade tokens and NFTs with other students.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.body: Track your tokens, predefined NFTs and custom NFTs.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.body: Compete on points: tokens, predefined and custom NFTs.

notWhitelisted.title: You are not whitelisted yet
notWhitelisted.body: Ask an admin to add your address to the whitelist before you can mint or trade.

scoring.title: How points work
scoring.body: Each GAME token is worth 1 point, each Predefined NFT 10 points and each Custom NFT 30 points.

about.title: About EduChain
about.subtitle: Seven contracts on Sepolia powering an educational web3 experience.

how.title: How it works
how.step2: Use the faucet for Sepolia ETH every 24h.
how.step3: Buy GAME tokens and mint NFTs in the shop.
how.step4: Trade with peers in the marketplace.

howSteps.1: An admin adds your address to the whitelist.
howSteps.3: Buy GAME tokens or mint NFTs in the shop.
howSteps.4: List items in the marketplace, or batch-mint custom NFTs with GAME.
howSteps.5: Climb the leaderboard: tokens × 1 pt, predefined NFTs × 10, custom NFTs × 30.

about.intro: EduChain is a learn-by-doing Web3 platform built around 7 audited Solidity contracts on Sepolia: a Whitelist gate, an ERC20 token, two ERC721 NFT collections, a multi-token marketplace, a tracking + leaderboard contract, and an ETH faucet.

contact.title: Contact EduChain
contact.subtitle: Partnerships, pilot programs, or platform questions.

participate.title: Participate
participate.body: Schools and educators can run a pilot — we onboard your students and provide training.

courses.title: Courses
courses.body: Web3 fundamentals, smart contract security, and live on-chain exercises tailored to your curriculum.

response.title: Response time
response.body: We reply within 48 hours on weekdays.

status.sent: Message sent. We respond within 48 hours.
status.error: Failed to send. Try again or email contact@educhain.eu.

custom.creative_info: Creative mode: mint a one-off custom NFT using your own tokenURI (IPFS or HTTPS). Pay in ETH.
custom.batch_warning: Batch mode: mint many copies at once, paid in GAME tokens. Uses a fixed preset tokenURI.
custom.batch_info: Uses GAME tokens instead of ETH. {{price}} GAME per NFT. First approval required.

desc.whitelist: Access gate. Add, remove, and check whitelisted users and admins.
desc.gameToken: GAME ERC20 token. Transfers, balances, and supply operations.
desc.gameNFTPredefined: Curated NFT collection with fixed tokenURIs. Worth 10 points each.
desc.gameNFTCustom: User-created NFTs with custom metadata. Worth 30 points each.
desc.marketplace: Peer-to-peer marketplace for tokens and NFTs between whitelisted users.
desc.trackingContract: Leaderboard, points, and tier tracking for all users.
desc.ethFaucet: Dispenses 0.05 Sepolia ETH every 24h to whitelisted users.

gate.notConnectedBody: Connect your wallet to access this page.

gate.notWhitelistedBody: Only whitelisted users can access this page. Ask an admin to add your address.

gate.notOwnerBody: This page is restricted to the contract owner.
